rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARTHUR LAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: continued to 10/17/22 to cure the following issues by Mr. Turpin: the actual assignments must be filed (LRSF 14.35.B.), not just the notice of assignment; in addition, consideration of the amount of the assignment is a two-pronged approach, the percentage and then the actual dollar amount. A declaration must be filed that sets forth the basis for the court to find the dollar amount of the assignments is not grossly unreasonable. The following issues must be cured by the petitioner: the Letters appointing Theresa Gee must be certified within the last 60 days (LRSF 14.35.G); updated certified letters must be filed by the PG in Solano County, as the Letters filed are from 2015; and finally, a declaration is required addressing the additional interest charged to the estate for failure to send the payment to the IRS in a timely manner (~750) and whether that amount is appropriately charged to the estate as opposed to being offset by a reduction in the statutory fees. filing deadline is noon on 10/10/22.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LEONISA TRIAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/24/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Counsel still hasn't filed the confidential statement of duties and liabilities. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 2) The First Supplement alleges "Christopher Trias and Jason Trias are adults." Neither of these persons are listed on the petition under attachment 8. Please explain. 3) Notice does not include the required language in Local Rule 14.1. D and must be re-done for all parties. [Probate Code 1202]. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/10/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH E. SU
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/24/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) A response to issues #2 and 3 were filed in a Declaration by the attorney and must be in a declaration signed and verified by petitioner. [See CRC 7.103] 2) A proposed nonresident personal representative will be required to post a bond to protect California creditors, even if the will waives, or all beneficiaries waive, bond. A declaration or attachment to the petition setting forth in detail the anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate will be used by the Court to determine the amount of the bond, but in no event will the bond be less than $20,000. [LRSF 14.16 F.] 3) Petitioner did not select a required box on page 3 under #5.a. (3) or (4). 4) Petitioner must file a DE-147 Duties and Liabilities. 5) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/10/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.]
